title: Menu Library
text: Menu Library Use this editor to define menu bars, drop-down menus, and popup menus for use in desktop applications. Properties Menu Path Item Referenced Menu Menu Description Type Item Description Accelerator Enable Item by Default Hint Text How to Define and Use Menus Define Dynamic Menus Related Links Menu Objects Uniface enables you to define menu bar, drop-down menu, and pop-up menu objects for use in Windows applications. Menu Items A menu item can be a menu option that results in an action, a reference to another menu, such as a cascaded menu or included menu, or a separator for grouping items. Menu items have associated triggers in which to program the conditions under which they are displayed and the action they perform. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
